description: §14.8.7 — a `<db>` block whose `src=` file does not exist AND which has no CREATE TABLE for a scoped table fires E-PA-002: the analyzer can neither open the real DB nor build an in-memory shadow DB, so it cannot validate the schema and fails closed.
source-test: compiler/src/protect-analyzer.ts (E-PA-002 fire site: resolveDb missing-file + no CREATE TABLE)
rationale: protect-analyzer resolveDb(): with the `src=` file absent and no `?{}` CREATE TABLE statement for `users`, there is no shadow-DB source, so schema-backed protect analysis is impossible and E-PA-002 fires (returns null).
